title: usePWAInstaller
description: Detects PWA install availability and handles prompting for installation.
summary: Enables installation logic for Progressive Web Apps.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `usePWAInstaller` works.

<UsePwaInstallerDemosUsage />

## API References

- [`mdn`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Progressive_web_apps/Guides/What_is_a_progressive_web_app)
- [`web.dev`](https://web.dev/explore/progressive-web-apps)
- [`learn`](https://web.dev/learn/pwa/)
- [`microsoft`](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/progressive-web-apps-chromium/)
- [`demos`](https://github.com/MicrosoftEdge/Demos)

Progressive web apps combine the best features of traditional websites and platform-specific apps.
The assumption is that you have already defined [manifest.json](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Progressive_web_apps/Tutorials/js13kGames/Installable_PWAs) in the project, so you want to create a [trigger prompt](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Progressive_web_apps/How_to/Trigger_install_prompt) for users to install the PWA from your application.

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.

<SourceCodes name="use-pwa-installer" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-pwa-installer",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";\r
\r
export function usePWAInstaller() {\r
  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState<any>(null);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const beforeInstallPromptHandler = (event: any) => {\r
      event.preventDefault();\r
      setPrompt(event);\r
    };\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("beforeinstallprompt", beforeInstallPromptHandler);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("beforeinstallprompt", beforeInstallPromptHandler);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  const installer = async () => {\r
    if (!prompt) return;\r
\r
    try {\r
      const result = await prompt.prompt();\r
      console.log(\`Install prompt was: \${result.outcome}\`);\r
    } catch (error) {\r
      console.error("Error while prompting install:", error);\r
    }\r
\r
    setPrompt(null);\r
  };\r
\r
  const disableInAppInstallPrompt = () => {\r
    setPrompt(null);\r
  };\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const appInstalledHandler = () => {\r
      disableInAppInstallPrompt();\r
    };\r
\r
    window.addEventListener("appinstalled", appInstalledHandler);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("appinstalled", appInstalledHandler);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return { prompt, installer, disableInAppInstallPrompt };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-pwa-installer.ts"})]})}function h(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(d,{...n})}):d(n)}function p(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return k(y);})();
